requirement_topic.en: CSA/SCC electrical safety — CSA C22.2 No. 63 and CSA C22.2 No. 120 pathways
requirement_topic.zh: CSA/SCC电气安全——CSA C22.2 No. 63和CSA C22.2 No. 120路径
requirement_topic.zht: CSA/SCC電氣安全——CSA C22.2 No. 63和CSA C22.2 No. 120路徑

summary.en: Electrical refrigerators and refrigeration equipment sold in Canada generally need approval or certification accepted by the relevant provincial or territorial electrical safety authority. The market-access obligation comes from Canadian electrical safety laws and authority rules; certification is typically issued by an SCC-accredited certification body using Canadian standards. CSA C22.2 No. 63 covers household refrigerators and freezers, while CSA C22.2 No. 120 is relevant to refrigeration equipment depending on product design and scope.
summary.zh: 在加拿大销售的电冰箱和制冷设备通常需要获得相关省或地区电气安全主管机关接受的批准或认证。市场准入义务来自加拿大电气安全法律及主管机关规则；认证通常由SCC认可认证机构按加拿大标准签发。CSA C22.2 No. 63适用于家用电冰箱和冷柜，CSA C22.2 No. 120则视产品设计和范围适用于制冷设备。
summary.zht: 在加拿大銷售的電冰箱和製冷設備通常需要獲得相關省或地區電氣安全主管機關接受的批准或認證。市場准入義務來自加拿大電氣安全法律及主管機關規則；認證通常由SCC認可認證機構按加拿大標準簽發。CSA C22.2 No. 63適用於家用電冰箱和冷櫃，CSA C22.2 No. 120則視產品設計和範圍適用於製冷設備。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial Canadian electrical safety approval requirements for electrical products
SCC-accredited certification body approval/listing accepted by Canadian electrical safety authorities
CSA C22.2 No. 63 — Household Refrigerators and Freezers

summary.en: China household refrigerator electrical safety is commonly addressed through CCC certification against GB 4706.1 and GB 4706.13. CCC is mandatory in China but is not a Canadian electrical approval mark and is not issued by an SCC-accredited certification body for Canada.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱电气安全通常通过依据GB 4706.1和GB 4706.13的CCC认证处理。CCC在中国属于强制认证，但不是加拿大电气批准标志，也不是由面向加拿大的SCC认可认证机构签发。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱電氣安全通常通過依據GB 4706.1和GB 4706.13的CCC認證處理。CCC在中國屬於強制認證，但不是加拿大電氣批准標誌，也不是由面向加拿大的SCC認可認證機構簽發。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1 — Household and similar electrical appliances safety general requirements
GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
CCC mandatory certification catalogue and implementation rules for household appliances

gap.en: Canadian approval focuses on a Canadian certification mark/listing accepted by electrical authorities, not only technical similarity to IEC/GB safety tests. The exporter must select the correct Canadian standard scope, resolve 120 V/60 Hz and Canadian plug/cord/marking requirements, and obtain an accepted certification mark before sale.
gap.zh: 加拿大批准关注被电气主管机关接受的加拿大认证标志/列名，而不仅是与IEC/GB安全测试的技术相似性。出口商须选择正确的加拿大标准范围，解决120 V/60 Hz及加拿大插头、电源线、标识要求，并在销售前取得被接受的认证标志。
gap.zht: 加拿大批准關注被電氣主管機關接受的加拿大認證標誌/列名，而不僅是與IEC/GB安全測試的技術相似性。出口商須選擇正確的加拿大標準範圍，解決120 V/60 Hz及加拿大插頭、電源線、標識要求，並在銷售前取得被接受的認證標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory electrical product approval/certification under Canadian provincial or territorial authority rules; CSA C22.2 No. 63 and CSA C22.2 No. 120 are Canadian standards used by certification bodies, not standalone federal regulations
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification to GB 4706.1 and GB 4706.13 is mandatory for covered household refrigerators in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Plan for Canadian electrical certification with an SCC-accredited certification body. CCC/GB 4706.13 reports may reduce engineering retest effort but do not replace a Canadian certification mark or accepted field approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】应安排由SCC认可认证机构进行加拿大电气认证。CCC/GB 4706.13报告可能降低工程复测工作量，但不能替代加拿大认证标志或被接受的现场批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】應安排由SCC認可認證機構進行加拿大電氣認證。CCC/GB 4706.13報告可能降低工程復測工作量，但不能替代加拿大認證標誌或被接受的現場批准。

requirement_topic.en: CSA/SCC electrical safety — refrigeration equipment scope check
requirement_topic.zh: CSA/SCC电气安全——制冷设备范围核查
requirement_topic.zht: CSA/SCC電氣安全——製冷設備範圍核查

summary.en: Some cold-appliance configurations may fall outside a simple household refrigerator/freezer scope and require assessment against refrigeration equipment requirements. The mandatory Canadian obligation remains approval or certification accepted by the relevant electrical safety authority; CSA C22.2 No. 120 is a Canadian standard used by certification bodies for refrigeration equipment where its scope applies.
summary.zh: 部分制冷器具配置可能超出简单家用电冰箱/冷柜范围，并需要按制冷设备要求评估。加拿大强制义务仍是获得相关电气安全主管机关接受的批准或认证；CSA C22.2 No. 120是在其范围适用时供认证机构用于制冷设备的加拿大标准。
summary.zht: 部分製冷器具配置可能超出簡單家用電冰箱/冷櫃範圍，並需要按製冷設備要求評估。加拿大強制義務仍是獲得相關電氣安全主管機關接受的批准或認證；CSA C22.2 No. 120是在其範圍適用時供認證機構用於製冷設備的加拿大標準。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial Canadian electrical safety approval requirements for electrical products
SCC-accredited certification body approval/listing accepted by Canadian electrical safety authorities

summary.en: China may classify the same export model under household appliance CCC files, commercial refrigeration files, or project-specific safety documentation depending on construction and use. That classification does not determine the Canadian certification standard scope.
summary.zh: 中国可能根据结构和用途将同一出口型号归入家用电器CCC文件、商用制冷文件或项目特定安全文件。该分类不能决定加拿大认证标准范围。
summary.zht: 中國可能根據結構和用途將同一出口型號歸入家用電器CCC文件、商用製冷文件或項目特定安全文件。該分類不能決定加拿大認證標準範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
Applicable China commercial refrigeration or appliance safety standards depending on model scope

gap.en: Before testing, the importer should confirm whether the Canadian certification body will apply CSA C22.2 No. 63, CSA C22.2 No. 120, both, or another Canadian standard. Misclassification can lead to retesting, relabelling, or rejection of the certification file.
gap.zh: 测试前，进口商应确认加拿大认证机构将适用CSA C22.2 No. 63、CSA C22.2 No. 120、两者或其他加拿大标准。分类错误可能导致重新测试、重新贴标或认证文件被拒。
gap.zht: 測試前，進口商應確認加拿大認證機構將適用CSA C22.2 No. 63、CSA C22.2 No. 120、兩者或其他加拿大標準。分類錯誤可能導致重新測試、重新貼標或認證文件被拒。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory electrical product approval/certification under Canadian provincial or territorial authority rules; CSA C22.2 No. 120 is a Canadian standard used by certification bodies where applicable, not a standalone federal regulation
mandatory_status.cn: China safety classification and CCC status do not substitute for Canadian electrical authority acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Perform a Canadian scope classification before quoting tests or printing marks. Mixed household/commercial or specialty refrigeration products may need CSA C22.2 No. 120 evaluation in addition to, or instead of, the household refrigerator standard.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】在测试报价或印刷标志前应先进行加拿大范围分类。混合家用/商用或特殊制冷产品可能需要按CSA C22.2 No. 120评估，并可能同时或替代适用家用电冰箱标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】在測試報價或印刷標誌前應先進行加拿大範圍分類。混合家用/商用或特殊製冷產品可能需要按CSA C22.2 No. 120評估，並可能同時或替代適用家用電冰箱標準。
